title: Sales Manager Vacancy at REA India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at REA India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Sales Manager looking for your next big career move? REA India in Bhubaneswar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About REA India:
REA India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with REA India!
